global_description: Large marsupial with powerful hind legs, long tail, and small head. Fur is typically brown or gray, with a muscular build and a pouch on the abdomen for carrying young.

part_details.head: Small with large ears and a pointed snout
part_details.body: Muscular with short fur, typically brown or gray
part_details.hind legs: Long and powerful, adapted for jumping
part_details.tail: Long and thick, used for balance
part_details.pouch: Located on the abdomen, used for carrying young

spatial_relations: Hind legs beneath and extending from rear
